segments:
I decided that I needed a few days off and I realized that
I ran out of vacation time already. I figured the best way
to get the Boss to send me home was to act a little crazy.
I figured he'd think I was burning out and give me some
time off.
I went into work early the other day and began hanging upside down
from the ceiling. Just then one of my coworkers (she's blonde...it'll be
important later) came in and asked me what I was doing. "Shhh," I said,
"I'm acting crazy to get a few days off. I'm a light bulb."
A second later the Boss walked by and asked me what I was doing. "I'm
a light bulb!" I exclaimed.
"You're going crazy," he said. "Take a few
days off." With that, I jumped down and started walking out.
The blonde started following me and the Boss asked where she was
going.
"I can't work in the dark," she said
subject: Any thing for a day off
